questions: When you were building the research agent and Claude started hallucinating URLs, what made you keep pushing through instead of pivoting to a different approach?

You mentioned that tool descriptions are essentially prompt engineering — did you find yourself rewriting them multiple times, or did you get it right pretty quickly once you understood that principle?

By the end of the week, 80% of your code was resilience infrastructure. Did that feel like wasted effort, or did watching the agent fail on Days 1-4 make you genuinely grateful for all that scaffolding?
